title: Super Performance
description: Super Performance is a modpack for ultimate performance in Minecraft using fabric
body:
Super Performance is a Minecraft modpack designed to **supercharge your gameplay experience**. Built on the Fabric mod loader, this pack focuses exclusively on optimizing performance.

## Key Features

**Blazing Fast Performance:** Super Performance incorporates cutting-edge optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight to dramatically boost frame rates and reduce lag, even on lower-end systems.

**Smooth Gameplay:** Enjoy seamless transitions and reduced stuttering thanks to LazyDFU, ModernFix, and Dynamic FPS.

**Resource Efficiency:** FerriteCore and EntityCulling work behind the scenes to reduce memory usage and improve overall system performance.

**Customization:** Fine-tune your experience with Sodium Extra and Reese's Sodium Options, allowing you to tailor graphics settings to your preferences.

Super Performance strikes the perfect balance between raw power and visual enhancement, ensuring that your Minecraft world runs smoother. Whether you're exploring vast landscapes or building intricate redstone contraptions, this modpack delivers an optimized experience without compromising on vanilla gameplay.

## **Acknowledgment to Mod Developers**

A heartfelt thank you to the incredible developers of these mods for their hard work and dedication in creating tools that enhance the Minecraft experience. Your contributions are invaluable to the community!




<details>
<summary>Mod List for Super Performance</summary>

LazyDFU - Optimizes the data fix-up process for faster loading times.

ModernFix - Addresses performance issues and enhances game stability.

Lithium - A general-purpose optimization mod that improves server and client performance without changing gameplay mechanics.

Starlight - Rewrites the lighting engine for faster chunk loading and improved lighting performance.

LambDynamicLights - Adds dynamic lighting to the game, allowing for real-time light source visibility.

Cull Leaves - Enhances performance by culling leaves that are not visible to the player.
Iris - A shader mod that integrates seamlessly with Sodium, providing beautiful graphics and effects.

ImmediatelyFast - Optimizes various aspects of the game for improved performance.

FerriteCore - Reduces memory usage by optimizing chunk loading and entity management.

Clumps - Merges experience orbs into a single entity to reduce lag and improve performance.

Sodium Extra - Enhances Sodium with additional features and optimizations.

Reese's Sodium Options - Provides a user-friendly interface for tweaking Sodium settings.

Sodium - A performance-focused rendering engine that significantly boosts FPS and reduces stutter.

Indium - Bridges the gap between Fabric mods and Sodium, ensuring compatibility and enhanced performance.

Mod Menu - A simple and effective way to manage and configure mods within the game.

Better Beds - Improves bed mechanics in Minecraft for a smoother gameplay experience.

Fabric API - A core library that provides essential tools for mod developers, ensuring 
compatibility and functionality.

EntityCulling-Fabric - Optimizes rendering by culling entities that are not in the player's view.

Dynamic FPS - Automatically adjusts the game's FPS based on the current load for a smoother experience.

</details>
